items.title: Activist who pushed 2020 election fraud claims convicted of election fraud
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Army commander convicted of Guinea stadium massacre dies in prison
items.dek: Aboubacar Sidiki Diakité was convicted over the 2009 massacre in which more than 150 people were killed.
items.body: Aboubacar Sidiki Diakité was convicted over the 2009 massacre in which more than 150 people were killed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
items.dek: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.
items.body: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.
items.author: IriLine Desk
